concept: I want a game where the player controls two characters simultaneously - one in a floating sky city and one in the dark underworld below. Actions in one world directly affect the other, creating a symbiotic relationship where progress requires coordination between both characters. Environmental puzzles span both realms, with solutions often requiring the sky character to manipulate light that affects shadow-based mechanisms in the underworld. As the narrative unfolds, players discover these worlds are drifting closer together, threatening catastrophic collision. The ultimate goal involves finding balance between the realms rather than saving just one at the expense of the other.
